title: Speedy Flying Mobs
description: Makes speed/slowness potions work on Happy Ghasts and other flying mobs.
body:
Makes speed/slowness potions work on Happy Ghasts and other flying mobs. Enjoy your faster ghasts!

Speed/slowness potions currently do not work on flying mobs due to a vanilla bug ([MC-40949]([https://mojira-viewer.jacobsjo.eu/browse/MC-40949](https://mojira-viewer.jacobsjo.eu/browse/MC-40949))), this datapack fixes that. (This datapack only fixes potions not working, not the `movement_speed` attribute in general.)
